name: W6 Legs Morning Flow
description: 15 min squat prep. You're going for 75/side on the last set today. Hip mobility and glute activation matter more than ever.

exercises.notes: 3 seconds down, 2 in the hole, drive up. You own this pattern.
Low lunge + twist. Hip flexors and thoracic.
45s each side. Should be noticeably deeper than W4.
30s each side. Elbows down. The deep one.
Deep side lunge. 5 weeks of cossack squats made these natural.
Squeeze at top. Activate before you load the bar.
Core bracing — you're going to 75/side today.

tips: 15 min — 75/side attempt on the last set today. This flow matters.
Pigeon and lizard: your hip mobility has been improving steadily. Go deeper.
Glute bridge: activates glutes for squat. Don't skip it.
If short on time: hip warmup + pigeon + glute bridge. 8 min.
